# ManyFeed

## About
ManyFeed is a comprehensive review management platform designed for digital businesses in Brazil and Latin America. It enables users to collect, manage, display, and analyze customer reviews across multiple channels.

## Core Features
- **Coleta (Collection):** Automated review collection via email and WhatsApp after each purchase, with smart follow-ups and pre-built message templates.
- **Gestão (Management):** Unified dashboard to view, filter, and respond to reviews from all platforms. Includes AI-powered quick responses and negative review alerts.
- **Exibição (Display):** Responsive, customizable widgets (carousel, grid, list) for embedding reviews on websites and landing pages with a single line of code.
- **Integrações (Integrations):** Syncs with Google Reviews, Hotmart, Kiwify, and more. Supports CSV bulk import and offers an open API.
- **Resultados (Results):** Conversion metrics dashboard, per-widget conversion rates, exportable reports, and before/after comparisons.

## Target Audience
Digital product creators, e-commerce stores, SaaS companies, course creators, and agencies looking to leverage social proof for higher conversion rates.

## Tech Stack
React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite

## URL
https://billowing-rice-5144.dev.animaapp.io
